'''Aari Covitenn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as the secretary of [[Gaeriel Captison]] at the time of the [[Invasion of Bakura]]. In addition to her secretarial functions, she was also a capabale [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]], and had managed to hack the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] communications network in [[Wilek Nereus]]' office, thus letting her boss know what the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] was planning before the general populace did.<ref name="The Truce at Bakura" />
